backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Creative Prints backend, defining data types (Product, GalleryItem, CustomOrder, StoreOrder, PaymentConfirmation) and state maps, with admin access control tied to lanepeevy@gmail.com and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial data migration module that passes state through unchanged, serving as a placeholder for future schema migrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three product requirements (storefront features, admin access, logo display) to their implementing source files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Deployment guide listing prerequisites (Node.js, pnpm, DFX) and a build/deploy checklist for the Creative Prints application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Creative Prints and Design - 3D Printing Services', linking the favicon, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, store, gallery, custom-order, checkout, order-success, admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin panel component for managing gallery items, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with image upload progress tracking via dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin panel component that lists store orders in a table and allows updating each order's status via a dropdown select with color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsMa: Admin panel component that displays all payment confirmation submissions sorted by date, with a dialog to view the uploaded payment proof image.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin UI component for managing products (add, edit, delete) with a form dialog supporting image upload with progress tracking, backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AuthDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component providing login, signup, and forgot-password tabs with form validation, error display, and toast notifications; blocks signup with the reserved admin email.
frontend/src/components/DeploymentErrorS: Displays a styled error screen with the error name, message, stack trace, and component stack, with options to copy details to clipboard or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and renders the DeploymentErrorScreen component with error details.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, cart badge, Internet Identity login/logout, and admin link for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity and initializing admin access control via a secret token from URL params.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Zustand store providing email/password authentication with localStorage-backed user persistence, a hardcoded permanent admin account, and an optional backend registration callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store managing shopping cart state (add, remove, update quantity, clear) with localStorage persistence and custom BigInt serialization for product prices.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, gallery items, custom orders, store orders, and user profiles via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, plus a utility class for a grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that handles Internet Identity authentication, first-time profile setup, and admin verification, then renders tabbed management panels for products, orders, gallery, and payments.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that collects customer contact info, displays cart items with quantity controls, handles optional payment proof file upload, and submits one order per cart item to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order request page requiring Internet Identity login, allowing authenticated users to submit a project description with optional 3D model file upload and contact details.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays all gallery items in a masonry-style column layout, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing home page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, a features grid highlighting the 3D printing service's key selling points, and links to the store and custom order pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page that reads customer name, item count, and total from URL search params, then displays an order summary card and a step-by-step 'what happens next' timeline.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Renders the product store page with a grid of ProductCards that support add-to-cart and quantity adjustment, plus a checkout button showing total cart items. Uses React Query for product fetching and a Zustand-based cart hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Creative Prints, listing existing features (storefront, admin panel, logo), architectural notes about Internet Identity authentication, and metadata like project name and schema version.
